_readme: Define all agent personas for this experiment. Alternatively, point agents in experiment.json to shared personas using 'personas_file': '../../shared/personas/domain_name.json'.

agent_name_here.name: Display Name
agent_name_here.system_prompt: You are [Name]. [Full persona prompt here — voice, intellectual style, how they engage, what they value, what they resist. Be specific and rich. This is what defines the character in every response.]
